statement.p: To save up for a new phone that costs {\$600}\text{,} Makayla sets aside 1\% of her pay each week. This works out to {\$7.59} per week. At present, she has {\$301.50} saved up. How long will it be until Makayla has saved up enough? Write an equation to model this scenario. There is no need to solve it.
